mapper.select: SELECT t.topic_id, t.teacher_id, u.nick_name AS teacher_name, t.title, t.description, t.skills, t.keywords, t.category_id, c.category_name, t.max_students, t.status, t.create_time FROM project_topic t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = t.teacher_id LEFT JOIN project_category c ON c.category_id = t.category_id WHERE t.del_flag = '0' AND t.status = 'Open' ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.topic_id, t.teacher_id, u.nick_name AS teacher_name, t.title, t.description, t.skills, t.keywords, t.category_id, c.category_name, t.max_students, t.status, t.create_time FROM project_topic t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = t.teacher_id LEFT JOIN project_category c ON c.category_id = t.category_id WHERE t.teacher_id = #{teacherId} AND t.del_flag = '0' ORDER BY t.create_time DESC

SELECT t.topic_id, t.teacher_id, u.nick_name AS teacher_name, t.title, t.description, t.skills, t.keywords, t.category_id, c.category_name, t.max_students, t.status, t.create_time FROM project_topic t LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = t.teacher_id LEFT JOIN project_category c ON c.category_id = t.category_id WHERE t.topic_id = #{topicId} AND t.del_flag = '0'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO project_topic (teacher_id, title, description, skills, keywords, category_id, max_students, status, del_flag, create_time) VALUES (#{teacherId}, #{title}, #{description}, #{skills}, #{keywords}, #{categoryId}, #{maxStudents}, #{status}, '0', NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE project_topic SET title = #{title}, description = #{description}, skills = #{skills}, keywords = #{keywords}, category_id = #{categoryId}, max_students = #{maxStudents} WHERE topic_id = #{topicId}
